title: Randomized Benchmarking: Measuring Gate Fidelity
description: Learn randomized benchmarking (RB) protocols for measuring average gate fidelity. Understand standard RB, interleaved RB for single-gate characterization, and simultaneous RB for crosstalk detection.
learningObjectives: Explain the principles and advantages of randomized benchmarking over other fidelity measures
Implement standard Clifford randomized benchmarking protocols
Use interleaved RB to characterize individual gate errors
Apply simultaneous RB to detect and quantify crosstalk
Interpret RB results and convert to gate fidelity metrics
